source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A thin disk of radius $R$ and mass $M$ lying in the $xy$-plane has a point mass $m=5 M/4$ attached on its edge (as shown in Fig. 1.109). The moment of inertia of the disk about its center of mass is (the $z$-axis is out of the paper). Find the moment of inertia tensor of the combination of disk and point mass about point $A$ in the coordinate system shown.
extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image object representation rather than a file path or URL
caption mass value '$m = \\frac{5}{7} M$' conflicts with question text '$m=5 M/4$'

issues: metadata.extraction_notes reports a mass-value conflict between the caption ('$m = \\frac{5}{7} M$') and the question text ('$m=5 M/4$')
metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image object representation rather than a file path or URL

image_dependency: 题干显式写明“as shown in Fig. 1.109”且要求在“the coordinate system shown”下作答，关键信息依赖图示位置与坐标定义。
requires_image=true，text_dominant=false，说明该题不是纯文本即可完整求解。
需要从图中确定点质量相对圆盘与点A的空间关系，否则转动惯量张量的非对角项难以唯一确定。
multi_step: 目标是求组合体关于点A的转动惯量张量，通常需要分别处理圆盘与边缘点质量，再做张量叠加。
题目涉及从质心转到点A的参考点变换，以及二维平面分布导致的张量分量与乘积惯量计算，属于多步物理推导。
答案为完整3x3矩阵而非单一标量，通常需要多项分量计算与一致性检查。
verifiability: answer_present=true，且给出明确的解析矩阵形式，最终答案结构清晰，可逐项核验。
题目对象和已知量明确（薄圆盘、半径R、质量M、附着点质量m），理论上可用标准转动惯量与平行轴定理验证。
但资产记录中存在质量值冲突（图注与题干不一致），会降低基于题面的唯一可验证性。

candidate_problem_record.subject: 物理
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A thin disk of radius $R$ and mass $M$ lying in the $xy$-plane has a point mass $m=5 M/4$ attached on its edge (as shown in Fig. 1.109). The moment of inertia of the disk about its center of mass is (the $z$-axis is out of the paper). Find the moment of inertia tensor of the combination of disk and point mass about point $A$ in the coordinate system shown.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image object representation rather than a file path or URL
caption mass value '$m = \\frac{5}{7} M$' conflicts with question text '$m=5 M/4$'
metadata.reasoning_chain:
The contribution of a mass element $\Delta m$ at radius vector $\mathbf{r}=(x_{1}, x_{2}, x_{3})$ to the moments and products of inertia about the origin is given by $I_{ij}=\Delta m\,(r^{2}\delta_{ij}-x_{i}x_{j})$. Thus the moment of inertia tensor of the point mass about $A$ is
$$ rac{5MR^{2}}{4} egin{pmatrix}1 & -1 & 0\ -1 & 1 & 0\ 0 & 0 & 2\end{pmatrix},$$
and by using the parallel‐axis theorem the moment of inertia tensor of the disk about $A$ is
$$ rac{MR^{2}}{4} egin{pmatrix}5 & 0 & 0\ 0 & 1 & 0\ 0 & 0 & 6\end{pmatrix}.$$ 
Hence, the combined moment of inertia tensor about $A$ is
$$ rac{MR^{2}}{4} egin{pmatrix}10 & -5 & 0\ -5 & 6 & 0\ 0 & 0 & 16\end{pmatrix}.$$

$$ rac{MR^{2}}{4} egin{pmatrix}5 & 0 & 0\ 0 & 1 & 0\ 0 & 0 & 6\end{pmatrix}.$$

$$ rac{MR^{2}}{4} egin{pmatrix}10 & -5 & 0\ -5 & 6 & 0\ 0 & 0 & 16\end{pmatrix}.$$
